message.content:
AsciiDoc spec refactor in an MCM concept-model document. Working dir: /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster.

**Background:** A pace `collapse-investiture-into-viceroyalty` collapses BURP from multi-instance to singleton. The investiture identifier survives but becomes 1:1 with viceroyalty by construction (the investiture name MUST equal a registered viceroyalty name). The `BURP_VICEROYALTY` field is being dropped from the BURP regime; the cross-reference is now enforced by file-presence check (the BURN profile must exist at `.buk/rbmn_nodes/<investiture>/burn.env`).

**MCM linked-term pattern (from Tools/cmk/vov_veiled/MCM-MetaConceptModel.adoc):** Each quoin has three parts —
- Attribute reference: `:prefix_term:` in mapping section
- Replacement text: `<<anchor,Display>>`
- Definition: `[[anchor]] {attribute}:: text`

**Locked decisions from the docket:**
- `{burp_viceroyalty}` retires (the dropped field's anchor)
- `{burn_viceroyalty}` and `{burp_investiture}` stay
- `{burp_investiture}` definition tightens to express the 1:1-with-viceroyalty constraint
- `[[burn_host_singularity]]` premise body realigns to express the cross-reference without naming the dropped field
- BURP field count drops from four to three (drop `BURP_VICEROYALTY` from any field enumerations)

**Survey-confirmed surgical sites (verbatim line numbers from BUS0 = `Tools/buk/vov_veiled/BUS0-BashUtilitiesSpec.adoc`):**

1. Line 133 — attribute-reference row for `:burp_viceroyalty:` — DELETE
2. Lines 1082-1090 — `[[burp_viceroyalty]]` anchor + definition block — DELETE
3. Lines 1007-1022 — `[[burp_investiture]]` definition — REWRITE definition body to express that the investiture name is constrained to equal a registered viceroyalty (the BURP profile dir name must match a directory under `.buk/rbmn_nodes/`). Keep voicing annotation `//axl_voices axo_entity`. Keep the attribute ref at line 121 unchanged.
4. Lines 1024-1034 — `[[burn_host_singularity]]` premise body — REWRITE to express the cross-reference without naming `{burp_viceroyalty}`. The current text says BURP "reach the host by reference (via {burp_viceroyalty})". The new shape: the investiture name itself IS the viceroyalty name (1:1 by construction, file-presence-enforced); BURP carries no host data — it locates the BURN profile by directory-name correspondence.
5. Cross-reference cleanups for `{burp_viceroyalty}`:
   - BUS0 line 965 — within burn_host_singularity premise body (redundant with #4)
   - BUS0 line 1031 — within burn_host_singularity definition (redundant with #4)
   - BUS0 line 1072 — within burp_regime definition — rewrite the surrounding sentence to drop the reference

6. `Tools/buk/vov_veiled/BUSTPV-PrivilegeRegimeValidate.adoc` line 21 — field enumeration currently lists `{burp_node}, {burp_privileged_user}, {burp_privileged_key_file}, {burp_workload_key_file}`. The `{burp_node}` token is an undefined orphan attribute (verified — it has no definition anywhere). Drop `{burp_node}` from this enumeration entirely; the post-refactor field list is three fields: `{burp_privileged_user}, {burp_privileged_key_file}, and {burp_workload_key_file}`.

7. ALSO scan `Tools/buk/vov_veiled/BUSJ*.adoc` and `Tools/buk/vov_veiled/BUSTP*.adoc` for any other `{burp_viceroyalty}` references or "four field" / four-field BURP enumerations and update them. (Surveys did not find any beyond the above, but verify and clean up anything missed.)

**Editorial constraints:**
- Preserve all voicing annotations (`//axl_voices ...`) on quoins you keep
- Preserve the linked-term referencing style (use `{burp_investiture}`, `{burn_viceroyalty}`, etc., as attribute refs)
- Definitions should remain concise; new text should fit the surrounding tone (dense, definitional, no marketing prose)
- Premise bodies stay declarative, not prescriptive

**What to deliver:**
Make all the edits via the Edit/Write tools. Do not commit. After editing, run a quick verify: `grep -n 'burp_viceroyalty\|burp_node' Tools/buk/vov_veiled/BUS0-BashUtilitiesSpec.adoc Tools/buk/vov_veiled/BUSJ*.adoc Tools/buk/vov_veiled/BUSTP*.adoc` and confirm no remaining hits (it should be empty). Report back: list of files edited, line ranges affected, the new text of the rewritten `{burp_investiture}` definition and `[[burn_host_singularity]]` premise (verbatim), and the grep verification result.

Do NOT commit. Do NOT touch any files outside `Tools/buk/vov_veiled/`. Report under 400 words.

content.text: I'll start by reading the relevant sections of the files to understand the context before editing.

955	it carries no key material and changes rarely.
956	+
957	{burn_regime}
958	files live under `.buk/rbmn_nodes/<{burn_viceroyalty}>/burn.env`.
959	+
960	{burn_regime}
961	is the sole home of node address-of-record per
962	{burn_host_singularity};
963	{burp_regime}
964	instances reference it via
965	{burp_viceroyalty}.
966	
967	[[burn_host]]
968	//axvr_variable axd_required axtu_string
969	{burn_host}::
970	IP address or hostname of the remote node.
971	
972	[[burn_platform]]
973	//axvr_variable axd_required axtu_xname
974	{burn_platform}::
975	OS family of the node.
976	Used by handbook diagnostics; the
977	{bus_jurisdiction}
978	implementation in
979	{bujb_jurisdiction}
980	selects shell mappings by garrison shell-letter rather than by node platform.
981	Values: `bubep_linux`, `bubep_mac`, `bubep_windows`.
982	
983	=== BURN/BURP Identifier Vocabulary
984	
985	The following quoins establish the minted-name vocabulary for the
986	BURN/BURP model.
987	
988	[[burn_viceroyalty]]
989	//axl_voices axo_entity
990	{burn_viceroyalty}::
991	The minted identifier of a
992	{burn_regime}
993	instance.
994	{burp_regime}
995	instances reference a node by its
996	{burn_viceroyalty}.
997	+
998	The
999	{burn_viceroyalty}
1000	is conveyed by the directory containing the
1001	{burn_regime}
1002	assignment file;
1003	it is not redundantly inscribed as a field within the file.
1004	+
1005	Examples: `redbox`, `winbox-prod`, `hawthorne`.
1006	
1007	[[burp_investiture]]
1008	//axl_voices axo_entity
1009	{burp_investiture}::
1010	The minted identifier of a
1011	{burp_regime}
1012	instance — the operator's named grant of privileged authority over a
1013	{burn_viceroyalty}.
1014	+
1015	The
1016	{burp_investiture}
1017	is conveyed by the directory containing the
1018	{burp_regime}
1019	assignment file;
1020	it is not redundantly inscribed as a field within the file.
1021	+
1022	Examples: `redbox-bhyslop-admin`, `winbox-prod-alice-admin`.
1023	
1024	[[burn_host_singularity]]
1025	//axl_voices axk_premise
1026	{burn_host_singularity}::
1027	The host of a node lives only in
1028	{burn_regime}.
1029	{burp_regime}
1030	instances reach the host by reference (via
1031	{burp_viceroyalty})
1032	and never duplicate it.
1033	A given node has exactly one address-of-record;
1034	credentials never re-state it.
1035	
1036	[[bus_keys_operator_owned]]
1037	//axl_voices axk_premise
1038	{bus_keys_operator_owned}::
1039	The system never generates or modifies SSH key material.
1040	The operator owns all key administration: keypair creation,
1041	distribution of pubkeys into regime files, and placement of private
1042	keys on the operator's station.
1043	Regime files carry only the public-key line;
1044	private keys live at operator-managed paths and are never written by
1045	BUK procedures.
1046	
1047	=== BURP Regime
1048	
1049	[[burp_prefix]]
1050	//axl_voices axrg_prefix
1051	{burp_prefix}::
1052	Bash Utility Regime Privileged
1053	
1054	[[burp_regime]]
1055	//axvr_regime axf_bash axrd_file_sourced
1056	{burp_regime}::
1057	Per-station-user credential regime carrying both privileged (admin)
1058	and workload key references for a single
1059	{burn_viceroyalty}.
1060	A
1061	{burp_regime}
1062	instance is identified by its
1063	{burp_investiture}
1064	(directory name).
1065	+
1066	{burp_regime}
1067	files live under
1068	`.buk/rbmu_users/<{burs_user}>/<{burp_investiture}>/burp.env`.
1069	+
1070	{burp_regime}
1071	references its node by
1072	{burp_viceroyalty}
1073	per
1074	{burn_host_singularity}.
1075	+
1076	Public keys are derived from private keys at use-time via `ssh-keygen -y`;
1077	neither the privileged nor the workload pubkey is stored in
1078	{burp_regime}.
1079	Encrypted (passphrase-protected) private keys are not supported because
1080	`ssh-keygen -y` would prompt interactively and hang the ceremony.
1081	
1082	[[burp_viceroyalty]]
1083	//axvr_variable axd_required axtu_xname
1084	{burp_viceroyalty}::

1	//axhob_operation
2	{bust_privilege_regime_validate}
3	
4	NOTE: Validates a single {burp_regime} profile, identified by positional
5	{burp_investiture}, for required-field presence and field-type
6	conformance.
7	Read-only; no remote contact.
8	
9	//axhopt_typed_parameter
10	{burp_investiture}
11	
12	//axhoq_precondition
13	A {burp_regime} profile with the given {burp_investiture} exists in the
14	local station-user subtree.
15	
16	//axhos_step
17	. *Load profile*: parse the profile file for the supplied
18	{burp_investiture}
19	
20	//axhos_step
21	. *Required fields*: confirm {burp_node}, {burp_privileged_user},
22	{burp_privileged_key_file}, and {burp_workload_key_file} are present
23	
24	//axhos_step
25	. *Key file readability*: confirm both {burp_privileged_key_file} and
26	{burp_workload_key_file} resolve to readable files on the operator's
27	station and are unencrypted (so `ssh-keygen -y` will not prompt)
28	
29	//axhog_guarantee
30	The verdict reflects the on-disk state at call time; no field was
31	modified.
32	
33	//axhoc_completion
34	Exit 0 when every check passes.
35	Non-zero with a diagnostic message identifying the first failed check.
36

content.text:
Clean — no hits. Grep exit=1 confirms zero matches.

---

**Files edited:**
- `Tools/buk/vov_veiled/BUS0-BashUtilitiesSpec.adoc` — 5 surgical edits (line 133 deletion; lines ~960–965, ~1007–1022, ~1024–1034, ~1066–1074, ~1082–1090 originals)
- `Tools/buk/vov_veiled/BUSTPV-PrivilegeRegimeValidate.adoc` — line 21 enumeration

**New `{burp_investiture}` definition (verbatim):**

```
[[burp_investiture]]
//axl_voices axo_entity
{burp_investiture}::
The minted identifier of a
{burp_regime}
instance — the operator's named grant of privileged authority over a
{burn_viceroyalty}.
+
The
{burp_investiture}
is conveyed by the directory containing the
{burp_regime}
assignment file;
it is not redundantly inscribed as a field within the file.
+
The
{burp_investiture}
name is constrained to equal a registered
{burn_viceroyalty}:
the directory name under `.buk/rbmu_users/<{burs_user}>/` MUST match a
directory name under `.buk/rbmn_nodes/`.
This 1:1 correspondence is enforced by file-presence check at load time;
no field carries the cross-reference.
+
Examples: `redbox`, `winbox-prod`, `hawthorne`.
```

**New `[[burn_host_singularity]]` premise (verbatim):**

```
[[burn_host_singularity]]
//axl_voices axk_premise
{burn_host_singularity}::
The host of a node lives only in
{burn_regime}.
{burp_regime}
carries no host data;
its
{burp_investiture}
name is by construction equal to a
{burn_viceroyalty},
and that directory-name correspondence locates the node.
A given node has exactly one address-of-record;
credentials never re-state it.
```

**Verification:** `grep -n 'burp_viceroyalty\|burp_node' …` returned no hits across BUS0, BUSJ*, and BUSTP* (exit code 1). All voicing annotations preserved. No commit performed.
